arts.ttl: Report: Andre Onana’s future on ropes as Man United enquire for young new goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United have ramped up their efforts to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford, making him a key target for the upcoming summer transfer window. The Red Devils are actively pursuing reinforcements between the sticks, and Trafford has emerged as a serious contender to challenge Andre Onana for the No.1 spot next season. The 22-year-old has […] The post Report: Andre Onana’s future on ropes as Man United enquire for young new goalkeeper appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Brazil's Dorival, Ancelotti discuss Endrick progress
arts.sum: Brazil coach Dorival Júnior has revealed he has had a long talk with Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti regarding Endrick's progress.

arts.ttl: Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit to keep World Cup dream alive
arts.sum: Endrick has hinted he could look to leave Real Madrid as the forward looks to keep his World Cup dream alive. The teenager signed for Real Madrid from Palmeiras in a €60m deal last summer but has struggled for first-team football. He has scored six goals in 28 appearances across all competitions, but is yet […] The post Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit to keep World Cup dream alive first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: The Barcelona man is in contention for the Ballon d'Or amid a breathtaking season which has seen him score 27 goals and set up a further 20.

arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's World Cup Qualifying - South America clash between Argentina and Brazil, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Man Utd deciding between two Andre Onana replacements as keeper linked with shock exit
arts.sum: Manchester United could opt to cash in on Andrea Onana this summer after watching him make a host of errors, with up and coming goalkeepers Lucas Chevalier and Senne Lammens thought to be on their shortlist of replacements
